mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student (user_id, student_no, college_id, major_id, class_id, enroll_date, graduate_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{studentNo}, #{collegeId}, #{majorId}, #{classId}, #{enrollDate}, #{graduateDate})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, student_no AS studentNo, college_id AS collegeId, major_id AS majorId, class_id AS classId, enroll_date AS enrollDate, graduate_date AS graduateDate, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM student WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, student_no AS studentNo, college_id AS collegeId, major_id AS majorId, class_id AS classId, enroll_date AS enrollDate, graduate_date AS graduateDate, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime FROM student WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE student SET student_no = #{studentNo}, college_id = #{collegeId}, major_id = #{majorId}, class_id = #{classId}, enroll_date = #{enrollDate}, graduate_date = #{graduateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT student_id AS studentId, user_id AS userId, student_no AS studentNo, phone, user_status AS userStatus, status_name AS statusName, real_name AS name, gender, gender_name AS genderName, avatar, id_card AS idCard, college_name AS collegeName, major_name AS majorName, class_name AS className, grade, enroll_date AS enrollDate, graduate_date AS graduateDate, counselor_name AS counselorName, supervisor_name AS supervisorName FROM v_student_info WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT student_id AS studentId, user_id AS userId, student_no AS studentNo, phone, user_status AS userStatus, status_name AS statusName, real_name AS name, gender, gender_name AS genderName, avatar, id_card AS idCard, college_name AS collegeName, major_name AS majorName, class_name AS className, grade, enroll_date AS enrollDate, graduate_date AS graduateDate, counselor_name AS counselorName, supervisor_name AS supervisorName FROM v_student_info ORDER BY student_id ASC
